issues.detail: The skill does not specify handling for cases where no performance issues are found or diff retrieval fails, leaving edge cases unaddressed.

scenarios.name: Review Django PR diff for N+1 query in order listing
scenarios.rationale: Treatment runs git diff main...HEAD, reports file/line, Critical severity, Database category, and suggests select_related/prefetch_related with concrete fix; baseline catches the N+1 conceptually but lacks the structured severity/category/fix format defined in the skill.

scenarios.name: Review React PR diff for re-render and bundle size regressions
scenarios.rationale: Treatment flags inline style/arrow as new references, suggests useMemo/useCallback with concrete code, and calls out moment→dayjs as Info severity per skill's frontend rubric; baseline mentions memoization vaguely without per-line file:line output or severity tiers.
